description: Payload returned by each final-review reviewer during proposal collection.

amendments.description: Proposed amendments. An empty list means "no amendments".

items.description: A raw amendment proposal returned by a final-review reviewer.

body.description: The free-form amendment body. This is canonicalized and deduplicated by the orchestration layer before voting.

anyOf.description: Optional reviewer-provided rationale for why this amendment matters.

title: FinalReviewProposalPayload
